name: AlphaBeat Editorial
bio: The AlphaBeat editorial team curates the Weekly Top 10, sector hubs, and stock pages. We read the prints, listen to the calls, and write what we'd want our own portfolio to read.

name: Jordan Yu
bio: Senior markets writer covering US tech, semiconductors, and the AI buildout. Previously a buy-side analyst at a large-cap tech fund. Believes the boring fundamentals usually win.
